goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'postcode', and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get area, postcode, and address
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
